====Pokémon Black 2 and White 2 Animated Trailer====
Nate appeared in the [[Pokémon Black Version 2 and Pokémon White Version 2 Animated Trailer]], first seen meeting [[Bianca]] together with [[Hugh]], choosing {{p|Tepig}} as his [[first partner Pokémon]]. He later appeared meeting [[Colress]] in [[Castelia City]], facing [[Elesa]] at the [[Nimbasa Gym]], battling [[Team Plasma]] aboard the [[Plasma Frigate]] alongside Hugh and [[Cheren]], and chasing a member of the [[Shadow Triad]] across the frozen [[Opelucid City]], but failing to recover the [[DNA Splicers|mysterious item]] they had stolen.
